name: Michael Sandel
bio: Michael Joseph Sandel is an American political philosopher and the Anne T. and Robert M. Bass Professor of Government at Harvard University, where his course Justice was the university's first course to be made freely available online and on television. It has been viewed by tens of millions of people around the world, including in China, where Sandel was named the 2011 "most influential foreign figure of the year".

awards.name: Princess of Asturias Award for Social Sciences
Fellow of the American Academy of Arts and Sciences
